raw.message: 이것이 바로 포커의 찐 재미, 한게임 포커

hook.summary: Influencers excitedly unbox a physical poker set from Hangame.
hook.visual_action: Two men celebrate with confetti while holding a black poker case and shouting the brand name.
hook.voiceover_transcript: 한게임에서 포커 세트를 보내주셨다! 한게임! 한게임! 한게임 포커!

scene_flow: Influencers unbox a physical poker set and celebrate with confetti.
Dynamic transition with playing cards flying into the screen.
Gameplay montage showing multiple players and betting action.
Winning hand sequence with fireworks and celebratory text overlays.
Final end card with influencers, game logo, and download prompt.
audience_proxy: Korean men aged 25-45 who enjoy social poker and follow popular local variety content creators.
